features: 【Extra Large Claw Clips】These hair clips are 5 inches, They are Oversized size - big enough to hold all your thick and heavy hair in place without causing discomfort or headaches. Sturdy and thick, they hold you hair in place beautifully.

【4 Neutral Colours】These claw clips are the jumbo size and they come in 4 different Neutral colors. 4 colours in total could match almost your outfits, hair colours and hairstyles. No matter what kind of hairstyle, casual or formal, it is extremely easy to achieve it.

【High-quality Material】Equipped with sturdy plastic + strong metal spring + double locking tooth design. The large claw clips have 16 teeth that are non-slip, you can confidently wear them without worrying about slippage or tangling, allowing you to focus on your daily activities.

【Wide Application】These large claw clips for thick hair can be applied to different occasions, making you more charming in daily life, parties, ceremonies, proms, birthdays, dating, holidays and photo shoots. They are suitable for thick hair, long straight or curly hair.

【Perfect Gift】Delicate hair clip sets are the hottest gifts for women and girls, as a wonderful gift for birthday party, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, graduation, anniversary, daily surprise. Perfect gifts for women hair accessories.
